title: Taffy Milligan
compiled_truth: Taffy Milligan is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-06-25 to 2001-06-15), Taffy Milligan sent 191 and received 927 emails, totalling 1118 interactions. Top correspondents: [Tana Jones](people/tana-jones) (145), [Mark Taylor](people/mark-taylor) (135), [Susan Bailey](people/susan-bailey) (132), [Sara Shackleton](people/sara-shackleton) (106), [Carol Clair](people/carol-clair) (98).
